text.title: Brand Voice Consistency System Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
attributes count=2 (r1 violation); do_dont_pairs empty (r2); channels empty (r3); owner=team; missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, last_drift_audit.
